---
title: "EnviroSec Final Script"
author: "Linden James"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=TRUE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

# Libraries 
library(mgcv)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(MASS)
library(sf)
library(spdep)
library(tidyr)
library(gt)
library(scales)
```

### Load Data + Prelim Checks

```{r}
# Load Data 
data_raw <- read.csv("/Users/linde/Downloads/EnviroSec Final Project Stuff/Rio CSV.csv")
rio_shp <- st_read("/Users/linde/Downloads/EnviroSec Final Project Stuff/rio_munic_ACTUAL_projected.shp", quiet = T)
```

```{r}
# Rename the columns
data <- data_raw %>%
  rename(
    code = CODE,
    city = Name, 
    has_dc = Has.DC,
    pm25 = PM2.5, 
    dc5 = DC.5km,
    dc10 = DC.10km,
    dc15 = DC.15km,
    hdi = HDI..2010., 
    wage = Avg.Monthly.Wage..2023., 
    health_num = Health.Establishments..2009., 
    avg_dc_years = Mean.Years.Since.DC.Construction)
```

Assumption Checks:

```{r}
# Linearity 
par(mfrow = c(1,3))
hist(data$dc5,  main = "DCs within 5 km",  xlab = "Count", breaks = 20)
hist(data$dc10, main = "DCs within 10 km", xlab = "Count", breaks = 20)
hist(data$dc15, main = "DCs within 15 km", xlab = "Count", breaks = 20)
par(mfrow = c(1,1))
```

```{r}
# Dispersion (to ensure Poisson assumptions are met)
dispersion_summary <- data.frame(
  buffer = c("dc5","dc10","dc15"),
  mean   = c(mean(data$dc5),  mean(data$dc10),  mean(data$dc15)),
  var    = c(var(data$dc5),   var(data$dc10),   var(data$dc15)))

dispersion_summary
```

```{r}

```

### Smoothed Non-Spatial Models

#### 5km Poisson GAM

```{r}
# Create the model 
gam_pois_dc5 <- gam(
  dc5 ~ 
    s(pm25,       k = 5) +
    s(hdi,        k = 5) +
    s(wage,       k = 5) +
    s(health_num, k = 5), 
  family = poisson(link = "log"),
  data   = data,
  method = "REML")

summary(gam_pois_dc5)
```

```{r}
# Check residual overdispersion 
disp_pois_dc5 <- gam_pois_dc5$deviance / gam_pois_dc5$df.residual

print(disp_pois_dc5)
```

```{r}
# Plot 
plot(gam_pois_dc5, pages = 1, shade = TRUE, main = "5km Poisson GAM")
```

#### 10km Poisson GAM

```{r}
# Create the model 
gam_pois_dc10 <- gam(
  dc10 ~ 
    s(pm25,       k = 5) +
    s(hdi,        k = 5) +
    s(wage,       k = 5) +
    s(health_num, k = 5), 
  family = poisson(link = "log"),
  data   = data,
  method = "REML")

summary(gam_pois_dc10)
```

```{r}
# Check residual overdispersion 
disp_pois_dc10 <- gam_pois_dc10$deviance / gam_pois_dc10$df.residual

disp_pois_dc10
```

```{r}
# Plot 
plot(gam_pois_dc10, pages = 1, shade = TRUE)
```

#### 15km Poisson GAM

```{r}
# Create the model 
gam_pois_dc15 <- gam(
  dc15 ~ 
    s(pm25,       k = 5) +
    s(hdi,        k = 5) +
    s(wage,       k = 5) +
    s(health_num, k = 5), 
  family = poisson(link = "log"),
  data   = data,
  method = "REML")

summary(gam_pois_dc15)
```

```{r}
# Check residual overdispersion 
disp_pois_dc15 <- gam_pois_dc15$deviance / gam_pois_dc15$df.residual

print(disp_pois_dc15) 
```

```{r}
# Check spatial autocorrelation 
resid_dev <- residuals(gam_pois_dc15, type = "deviance")

res_df <- data %>%
  mutate(resid_dev = resid_dev,
         code_chr  = as.character(code)) %>%
  dplyr::select(code_chr, resid_dev)

rio_shp2 <- rio_shp %>%
  mutate(code_chr = as.character(CD_MUN)) %>%
  left_join(res_df, by = "code_chr")

cat("Polygons in shapefile:", nrow(rio_shp2), "\n")
cat("Polygons matched to residuals:", sum(!is.na(rio_shp2$resid_dev)), "\n")
cat("Unmatched polygons:", sum(is.na(rio_shp2$resid_dev)), "\n")

rio_shp2 <- rio_shp2 %>% filter(!is.na(resid_dev))

nb_q <- poly2nb(rio_shp2, queen = TRUE)

lw_q <- nb2listw(nb_q, style = "W", zero.policy = TRUE)

moran_out <- moran.test(rio_shp2$resid_dev, lw_q,
                        randomisation = TRUE, zero.policy = TRUE)
print(moran_out)
```

```{r}
# Plot 
plot(gam_pois_dc15, pages = 1, shade = TRUE)
```

### Visualization of Smoothed Non-Spatial Models

```{r}
# Get libraries 
library(scales)
library(patchwork)
library(viridis)  
library(reshape2) 
```

```{r}
# Visualization housekeeping 
theme_set(theme_minimal(base_size = 13))
theme_update(
  panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
  plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
  axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"))

out_dir <- "figures_15km"
if (!dir.exists(out_dir)) dir.create(out_dir)

# Just working with 15 km for simplicity 
data <- data %>% mutate(has_dc15 = as.integer(dc15 > 0))

# Helper save function
ggsave2 <- function(filename, plot, w=8, h=5) {
  ggsave(file.path(out_dir, filename), plot = plot, width = w, height = h, dpi = 300)}
```

```{r}
# Distribution of DC intersect counts 
p_hist15 <- ggplot(data, aes(x = dc15)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 1, fill = "#1A9850", color = "white") +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of data center counts (15 km buffer)",
    x = "Data centers within 15 km",
    y = "Number of municipalities")

p_hist15
ggsave2("01_hist_dc15.png", p_hist15, w=8, h=5)

# Distribution of wages
p_hist_wage <- ggplot(data, aes(x = wage)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 500, fill = "#1A9850", color = "white") +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of average monthly wage (2023)",
    x = "Avg monthly wage (BRL)",
    y = "Number of municipalities") +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = label_number())

# Distribution of HDI
p_hist_hdi <- ggplot(data, aes(x = hdi)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 0.05, fill = "#1A9850", color = "white") +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of HDI (2010)",
    x = "HDI (2010)",
    y = "Number of municipalities")

# Distribution of PM2.5
p_hist_pm25 <- ggplot(data, aes(x = pm25)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 1, fill = "#1A9850", color = "white") +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of PM2.5",
    x = "PM2.5",
    y = "Number of municipalities")

# Distribution of health establishments
p_hist_health <- ggplot(data, aes(x = health_num)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 5, fill = "#1A9850", color = "white") +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of health establishments (2009)",
    x = "Health establishments (2009)",
    y = "Number of municipalities")

# Put all histograms together 
(p_hist15 | p_hist_wage) / (p_hist_hdi | p_hist_pm25) / (p_hist_health + plot_layout(guides = "collect"))
ggsave2("01_histograms_15km.png", (p_hist15 | p_hist_wage) / (p_hist_hdi | p_hist_pm25) / (p_hist_health + plot_layout(guides = "collect")), w=11, h=12)
```

```{r}
# Violin plots 
p_violin_pm25 <- ggplot(data, aes(x = factor(has_dc15), y = pm25, fill = factor(has_dc15))) +
  geom_violin(trim = FALSE, alpha = 0.7, color = "lightgreen") +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.15, outlier.alpha = 0.25, fill = "white") +
  scale_fill_viridis_d(end = 0.85, guide = "none") +
  labs(title = "PM2.5 by DC presence (15 km)", x = "Any DC within 15 km", y = "PM2.5")

p_violin_hdi <- ggplot(data, aes(x = factor(has_dc15), y = hdi, fill = factor(has_dc15))) +
  geom_violin(trim = FALSE, alpha = 0.7, color = NA) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.15, outlier.alpha = 0.25, fill = "white") +
  scale_fill_viridis_d(end = 0.85, guide = "none") +
  labs(title = "HDI by DC presence (15 km)", x = "Any DC within 15 km", y = "HDI (2010)")

p_violin_wage <- ggplot(data, aes(x = factor(has_dc15), y = wage, fill = factor(has_dc15))) +
  geom_violin(trim = FALSE, alpha = 0.7, color = NA) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.15, outlier.alpha = 0.25, fill = "white") +
  scale_fill_viridis_d(end = 0.85, guide = "none") +
  labs(title = "Wage by DC presence (15 km)", x = "Any DC within 15 km", y = "Avg monthly wage (2023)") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = label_number())

p_violin_health <- ggplot(data, aes(x = factor(has_dc15), y = health_num, fill = factor(has_dc15))) +
  geom_violin(trim = FALSE, alpha = 0.7, color = NA) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.15, outlier.alpha = 0.25, fill = "white") +
  scale_fill_viridis_d(end = 0.85, guide = "none") +
  labs(title = "Health establishments by DC presence (15 km)", x = "Any DC within 15 km", y = "Health establishments (2009)")

(p_violin_pm25 | p_violin_hdi) / (p_violin_wage | p_violin_health)
ggsave2("03_violin_presence_15km.png", (p_violin_pm25 | p_violin_hdi) / (p_violin_wage | p_violin_health), w=11, h=8)
```

```{r}
# Scatter plot (like plot(gam_pois_dc15) but fancier)
p_scatter_pm25 <- ggplot(data, aes(x = pm25, y = dc15)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.7, color = "darkgreen",
             position = position_jitter(height = 0.15, width = 0)) +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = TRUE, color = "black") +
  labs(title = "DC counts (15 km) vs. PM2.5", x = "PM2.5", y = "DCs within 15 km")

p_scatter_hdi <- ggplot(data, aes(x = hdi, y = dc15)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.7, color = "darkgreen",
             position = position_jitter(height = 0.15, width = 0)) +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = TRUE, color = "black") +
  labs(title = "DC counts (15 km) vs. HDI", x = "HDI (2010)", y = "DCs within 15 km")

p_scatter_wage <- ggplot(data, aes(x = wage, y = dc15)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.7, color = "darkgreen",
             position = position_jitter(height = 0.15, width = 0)) +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = TRUE, color = "black") +
  labs(title = "DC counts (15 km) vs. wage", x = "Avg monthly wage (2023)", y = "DCs within 15 km") +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = label_number())

p_scatter_health <- ggplot(data, aes(x = health_num, y = dc15)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.7, color = "darkgreen",
             position = position_jitter(height = 0.15, width = 0)) +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = TRUE, color = "black") +
  labs(title = "DC counts (15 km) vs. health establishments", x = "Health establishments (2009)", y = "DCs within 15 km")

(p_scatter_pm25 | p_scatter_hdi) / (p_scatter_wage | p_scatter_health)
ggsave2("04_scatter_bivariate_15km.png", (p_scatter_pm25 | p_scatter_hdi) / (p_scatter_wage | p_scatter_health), w=11, h=8)
```

```{r}
# Independent variable correlation heatmap 
pred_df <- data %>% dplyr::select(pm25, hdi, wage, health_num)
cor_mat <- cor(pred_df, use = "pairwise.complete.obs")
m <- reshape2::melt(cor_mat)

p_cor <- ggplot(m, aes(Var1, Var2, fill = value)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white") +
  scale_fill_gradient(limits = c(0,1), low = "white", high = "#1A9850") +
  coord_equal() +
  labs(title = "Correlation between predictors", x = NULL, y = NULL, fill = "r") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1))

p_cor
ggsave2("05_correlation_heatmap.png", p_cor, w=7, h=6)
```

```{r}
# Partial effects model 
partial_effect_df <- function(model, data, var, n = 200) {
  newdata <- data[rep(1, n), ]
  for (v in names(newdata)) {
    if (is.numeric(newdata[[v]])) newdata[[v]] <- median(data[[v]], na.rm = TRUE)}

  rng <- range(data[[var]], na.rm = TRUE)
  newdata[[var]] <- seq(rng[1], rng[2], length.out = n)

  pr <- predict(model, newdata = newdata, type = "link", se.fit = TRUE)
  newdata$fit_link <- pr$fit
  newdata$se_link  <- pr$se.fit

  newdata$fit <- exp(newdata$fit_link)
  newdata$lo  <- exp(newdata$fit_link - 1.96 * newdata$se_link)
  newdata$hi  <- exp(newdata$fit_link + 1.96 * newdata$se_link)

  dplyr::select(newdata, dplyr::all_of(var), fit, lo, hi)}


pe_pm25  <- partial_effect_df(gam_pois_dc15, data, "pm25")
pe_hdi   <- partial_effect_df(gam_pois_dc15, data, "hdi")
pe_wage  <- partial_effect_df(gam_pois_dc15, data, "wage")
pe_health<- partial_effect_df(gam_pois_dc15, data, "health_num")

p_pe_pm25 <- ggplot(pe_pm25, aes(x = pm25, y = fit)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lo, ymax = hi), alpha = 0.2, fill = "lightgreen") +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.1, color = "darkgreen") +
  labs(title = "Partial effect (15 km): PM2.5", x = "PM2.5", y = "Predicted DCs within 15 km")

p_pe_hdi <- ggplot(pe_hdi, aes(x = hdi, y = fit)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lo, ymax = hi), alpha = 0.2, fill = "lightgreen") +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.1, color = "darkgreen") +
  labs(title = "Partial effect (15 km): HDI", x = "HDI (2010)", y = "Predicted DCs within 15 km")

p_pe_wage <- ggplot(pe_wage, aes(x = wage, y = fit)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lo, ymax = hi), alpha = 0.2, fill = "lightgreen") +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.1, color = "darkgreen") +
  labs(title = "Partial effect (15 km): Wage", x = "Avg monthly wage (2023)", y = "Predicted DCs within 15 km") +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = label_number())

p_pe_health <- ggplot(pe_health, aes(x = health_num, y = fit)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lo, ymax = hi), alpha = 0.2, fill = "lightgreen") +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.1, color = "darkgreen") +
  labs(title = "Partial effect (15 km): Health establishments", x = "Health establishments (2009)", y = "Predicted DCs within 15 km")

(p_pe_pm25 | p_pe_hdi) / (p_pe_wage | p_pe_health)
ggsave2("06_partial_effects_gam_dc15.png", (p_pe_pm25 | p_pe_hdi) / (p_pe_wage | p_pe_health), w=11, h=8)
```

### Descriptive Stats Table for Paper

```{r}
vars_15km <- c("dc15", "has_dc15", "pm25", "hdi", "wage", "health_num")

var_labels <- c(
  dc15 = "DCs within 15 km (count)",
  has_dc15 = "Any DC within 15 km (0/1)",
  pm25 = "PM2.5",
  hdi = "HDI (2010)",
  wage = "Average monthly wage (2023)",
  health_num = "Health establishments (2009)"
)

desc_15km <- data %>%
  mutate(has_dc15 = as.integer(dc15 > 0)) %>%  # ensures has_dc15 exists/consistent
  dplyr::select(dplyr::all_of(vars_15km)) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = everything(), names_to = "variable", values_to = "value") %>%
  group_by(variable) %>%
  summarise(
    n      = sum(!is.na(value)),
    min    = min(value, na.rm = TRUE),
    median = median(value, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean   = mean(value, na.rm = TRUE),
    max    = max(value, na.rm = TRUE),
    IQR    = IQR(value, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd     = sd(value, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(variable = if_else(variable %in% names(var_labels), var_labels[variable], variable)) %>%
  relocate(variable)

tab_desc_15km <- desc_15km %>%
  gt(rowname_col = "variable") %>%
  tab_header(
    title = md("**Descriptive Statistics - 15 km Buffer Variables**"),
    subtitle = "Created by Linden James for EESCBC3020"
  ) %>%
  cols_label(
    n = "n",
    min = "Min",
    median = "Median",
    mean = "Mean",
    max = "Max",
    IQR = "IQR",
    sd = "SD"
  ) %>%
  fmt_number(
    columns = c(min, median, mean, max, IQR, sd),
    decimals = 3
  ) %>%
  fmt_number(columns = n, decimals = 0) %>%
  tab_options(
    table.font.size = px(12),
    data_row.padding = px(4),
    heading.title.font.size = px(14),
    heading.subtitle.font.size = px(12)
  ) %>%
  opt_row_striping() %>%
  opt_table_lines() %>%
  tab_style(
    style = cell_text(weight = "bold"),
    locations = cells_column_labels(everything())
  )

tab_desc_15km
```

```{r}
# Save the table 
gtsave(tab_desc_15km, "descriptive_stats_15km_gt.png")
```

```{r}
rio_shp2 <- rio_shp %>%
  mutate(code_chr = as.character(CD_MUN)) %>%
  left_join(data %>% mutate(code_chr = as.character(code)), by = "code_chr") %>%
  filter(!is.na(dc15))

# Doing centroids bc it's easier 
cent <- st_centroid(rio_shp2$geometry)
xy   <- st_coordinates(cent)
rio_shp2$x <- xy[, 1]
rio_shp2$y <- xy[, 2]

k_sp <- 50

gam_pois_dc15_sp <- gam(
  dc15 ~
    s(pm25,       k = 5) +
    s(hdi,        k = 5) +
    s(wage,       k = 5) +
    s(health_num, k = 5) +
    s(x, y, k = k_sp),
  family = poisson(link = "log"),
  data   = rio_shp2,
  method = "REML"
)

summary(gam_pois_dc15_sp)
```

```{r}
# Retest Moran's I 
nb_q <- poly2nb(rio_shp2, queen = TRUE)
lw_q <- nb2listw(nb_q, style = "W", zero.policy = TRUE)

resid_dev_sp <- residuals(gam_pois_dc15_sp, type = "deviance")
moran.test(resid_dev_sp, lw_q, randomisation = TRUE, zero.policy = TRUE)
```

```{r}
# Plot the spatial smooths 
plot(gam_pois_dc15_sp, pages = 1, shade = TRUE)
```

### Visualization of the Smoothed Spatial Model

```{r}
# Visualization housekeeping 
theme_set(theme_minimal(base_size = 13))
theme_update(
  panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
  plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
  axis.title = element_text(face = "bold")
)

out_dir <- "figures_15km_spatial"
if (!dir.exists(out_dir)) dir.create(out_dir)

# Again, just working with the 15 km buffers 
rio_shp2 <- rio_shp2 %>% mutate(has_dc15 = as.integer(dc15 > 0))
```

```{r}
# Distributions 
p_hist15 <- ggplot(rio_shp2, aes(x = dc15)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 1, fill = "#1A9850", color = "white") +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of data center counts (15 km buffer)",
    x = "Data centers within 15 km",
    y = "Number of municipalities"
  )

p_hist15
ggsave2("01_hist_dc15.png", p_hist15, w = 8, h = 5)

p_hist_wage <- ggplot(rio_shp2, aes(x = wage)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 500, fill = "#1A9850", color = "white") +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of average monthly wage (2023)",
    x = "Avg monthly wage",
    y = "Number of municipalities"
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = label_number())

p_hist_hdi <- ggplot(rio_shp2, aes(x = hdi)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 0.05, fill = "#1A9850", color = "white") +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of HDI (2010)",
    x = "HDI (2010)",
    y = "Number of municipalities"
  )

p_hist_pm25 <- ggplot(rio_shp2, aes(x = pm25)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 1, fill = "#1A9850", color = "white") +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of PM2.5",
    x = "PM2.5",
    y = "Number of municipalities"
  )

p_hist_health <- ggplot(rio_shp2, aes(x = health_num)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 5, fill = "#1A9850", color = "white") +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of health establishments (2009)",
    x = "Health establishments (2009)",
    y = "Number of municipalities"
  )

p_hist_grid <- (p_hist15 | p_hist_wage) / (p_hist_hdi | p_hist_pm25) / (p_hist_health + plot_layout(guides = "collect"))
p_hist_grid
ggsave2("01_histograms_15km.png", p_hist_grid, w = 11, h = 12)
```

```{r}
# Violin plots 
fill_vals <- c("0" = "lightgreen", "1" = "darkgreen")

p_violin_pm25 <- ggplot(rio_shp2, aes(x = factor(has_dc15), y = pm25, fill = factor(has_dc15))) +
  geom_violin(trim = FALSE, alpha = 0.7, color = NA) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.15, outlier.alpha = 0.25, fill = "white") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = fill_vals, guide = "none") +
  labs(title = "PM2.5 by DC presence (15 km)", x = "Any DC within 15 km", y = "PM2.5")

p_violin_hdi <- ggplot(rio_shp2, aes(x = factor(has_dc15), y = hdi, fill = factor(has_dc15))) +
  geom_violin(trim = FALSE, alpha = 0.7, color = NA) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.15, outlier.alpha = 0.25, fill = "white") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = fill_vals, guide = "none") +
  labs(title = "HDI by DC presence (15 km)", x = "Any DC within 15 km", y = "HDI (2010)")

p_violin_wage <- ggplot(rio_shp2, aes(x = factor(has_dc15), y = wage, fill = factor(has_dc15))) +
  geom_violin(trim = FALSE, alpha = 0.7, color = NA) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.15, outlier.alpha = 0.25, fill = "white") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = fill_vals, guide = "none") +
  labs(title = "Wage by DC presence (15 km)", x = "Any DC within 15 km", y = "Avg monthly wage (2023)") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = label_number())

p_violin_health <- ggplot(rio_shp2, aes(x = factor(has_dc15), y = health_num, fill = factor(has_dc15))) +
  geom_violin(trim = FALSE, alpha = 0.7, color = NA) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.15, outlier.alpha = 0.25, fill = "white") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = fill_vals, guide = "none") +
  labs(title = "Health establishments by DC presence (15 km)", x = "Any DC within 15 km", y = "Health establishments (2009)")

p_violin_grid <- (p_violin_pm25 | p_violin_hdi) / (p_violin_wage | p_violin_health)
p_violin_grid
ggsave2("03_violin_presence_15km.png", p_violin_grid, w = 11, h = 8)
```

```{r}
# Correlation 
pred_df <- rio_shp2 %>%
  st_drop_geometry() %>% 
  dplyr::select(pm25, hdi, wage, health_num) %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), as.numeric))  

cor_mat <- cor(pred_df, use = "pairwise.complete.obs")
m <- reshape2::melt(cor_mat)

p_cor <- ggplot(m, aes(Var1, Var2, fill = value)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white") +
  scale_fill_gradient(limits = c(0,1), low = "white", high = "#1A9850") +
  coord_equal() +
  labs(title = "Correlation between predictors", x = NULL, y = NULL, fill = "r") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1))

p_cor
ggsave2("04_correlation_heatmap.png", p_cor, w = 7, h = 6)
```

```{r}
# Partial effects model 
partial_effect_df <- function(model, data_for_model, var, n = 200) {
  newdata <- data_for_model[rep(1, n), ]
  for (v in names(newdata)) {
    if (is.numeric(newdata[[v]])) newdata[[v]] <- median(data_for_model[[v]], na.rm = TRUE)
  }

  rng <- range(data_for_model[[var]], na.rm = TRUE)
  newdata[[var]] <- seq(rng[1], rng[2], length.out = n)

  pr <- predict(model, newdata = newdata, type = "link", se.fit = TRUE)
  fit_link <- pr$fit
  se_link  <- pr$se.fit

  tibble(
    x = newdata[[var]],
    fit = exp(fit_link),
    lo  = exp(fit_link - 1.96 * se_link),
    hi  = exp(fit_link + 1.96 * se_link)
  )
}

pe_pm25   <- partial_effect_df(gam_pois_dc15_sp, rio_shp2, "pm25")
pe_hdi    <- partial_effect_df(gam_pois_dc15_sp, rio_shp2, "hdi")
pe_wage   <- partial_effect_df(gam_pois_dc15_sp, rio_shp2, "wage")
pe_health <- partial_effect_df(gam_pois_dc15_sp, rio_shp2, "health_num")

p_pe_pm25 <- ggplot(pe_pm25, aes(x = x, y = fit)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lo, ymax = hi), alpha = 0.2, fill = "lightgreen") +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.1, color = "darkgreen") +
  labs(title = "Partial effect (spatial GAM): PM2.5", x = "PM2.5", y = "Predicted DCs within 15 km")

p_pe_hdi <- ggplot(pe_hdi, aes(x = x, y = fit)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lo, ymax = hi), alpha = 0.2, fill = "lightgreen") +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.1, color = "darkgreen") +
  labs(title = "Partial effect (spatial GAM): HDI", x = "HDI (2010)", y = "Predicted DCs within 15 km")

p_pe_wage <- ggplot(pe_wage, aes(x = x, y = fit)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lo, ymax = hi), alpha = 0.2, fill = "lightgreen") +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.1, color = "darkgreen") +
  labs(title = "Partial effect (spatial GAM): Wage", x = "Avg monthly wage (2023)", y = "Predicted DCs within 15 km") +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = label_number())

p_pe_health <- ggplot(pe_health, aes(x = x, y = fit)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lo, ymax = hi), alpha = 0.2, fill = "lightgreen") +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.1, color = "darkgreen") +
  labs(title = "Partial effect (spatial GAM): Health establishments", x = "Health establishments (2009)", y = "Predicted DCs within 15 km")

p_pe_grid <- (p_pe_pm25 | p_pe_hdi) / (p_pe_wage | p_pe_health)
p_pe_grid
ggsave2("05_partial_effects_spatial_gam_dc15.png", p_pe_grid, w = 11, h = 8)
```

```{r}
# Spatial smooths map 
png(file.path(out_dir, "07_visgam_spatial_surface_dc15.png"), width = 1000, height = 800, res = 130)
vis.gam(
  gam_pois_dc15_sp,
  view = c("x", "y"),
  plot.type = "contour",
  color = "topo",
  too.far = 0.05,
  main = "Spatial smooth s(x,y): dc15 Poisson GAM (log link)"
)
dev.off()
```
